rationale: The cited paper appears potentially substantive because it develops a dynamic, stage-based latent-class choice model on complete longitudinal purchase histories, which closely overlaps with the citing paper’s dynamic compliance modeling using longitudinal individual data and regression mixtures. Even though the raw evidence is only a DOI match (reference index 15) without in-text context, the strong conceptual/methodological alignment suggests it could be a theory/method source rather than an incidental mention.
